paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 177 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 111 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 55 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 3 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** The oldest overdue task is 7 days past due with 24 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **35 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $22,633 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 44 days past due with 23 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **26 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $11,338 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Charles Harris — Argyle TX:** The oldest overdue task is 34 days past due with 22 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **13 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 21. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **73 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 8 days past due with 20 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **46 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $19,000 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 46 days past due with 19 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **10 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $19,981 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 10 days past due with 19 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **44 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $10,725 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Karim-Merchant:** The oldest overdue task is 7 days past due with 13 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **8 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Shaan Lagisetty (CNG-20251169):** The oldest overdue task is 20 days past due with 7 total — this has been stuck for days. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **13 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** Down to 6 overdue — making progress. Keep pushing to close them out today. **11 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 7 payment tasks due this week.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 3 overdue for multiple days running — no progress. This needs a direct conversation with the PM. **15 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $29,107 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Giselle Garcia:** Carrying 58 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Jeff:** Carrying 43 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Angel Pacheco:** Carrying 28 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Jonas De Cardenas:** Carrying 22 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Milagros Porturas:** Carrying 19 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.

338 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **294 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 25 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$105,734 in payments going out this week** across 63 tasks — make sure funds are available. $27,683 expected in from 3 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496) and Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458) — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 28. This needs to turn around today.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 19 overdue (oldest: 10d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **44 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 59 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** Down to 6 overdue — good. Close them out today. **11 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 20 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 3 overdue stuck for days — needs direct action, not just monitoring. **15 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 19 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
